meaning: n.默里(m.)  墨累河[澳大利亚东南部](澳大利亚最长和流域面积最大的河流)
examples: Murray is a judo black belt.
He prodded Murray with the shotgun.
Murray was a guest on a live radio show.
Mr. Murray can't wait them out, and he senses that his time is now.
The luckless Murray, 27, has recovered from a cruciate knee ligament injury suffered in pre-season training.
